name: Ferulic Acid
description: A potent antioxidant that stabilizes and boosts the efficacy of Vitamin C and E.
scientificSummary: A phytochemical found in various plants, particularly in cereals like rice, wheat, and oats, it is a powerful scavenger of free radicals.
mechanismOfAction: Works synergistically with Vitamin C and Vitamin E to double their photoprotective capacity.

seo.title: Ferulic Acid - The Antioxidant Booster | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn why Ferulic Acid is the secret ingredient that makes your Vitamin C serum even better.
